name: @rozie-ui/data-table

scripts.typecheck: echo 'no local TS to check (pure-Rozie source); the emitted leaves typecheck individually'

comment:headless-core-devdep: Phase 64 (D-04): @rozie-ui/headless-core is a SOURCE-ONLY workspace package whose `windowing.rzts` script-partial DISSOLVES into this family's compiled leaves via inlineScriptPartials() at compile — zero runtime dependency. It is a devDependency (the cross-package bare-specifier import is resolved at compile-time via the producer exports map; the canonical add-as-devDep mechanism proven in 64-01, no tsconfig paths needed).
comment:popover-devdep: Phase 75 / Option A (D-05/D-07): data-table composes @rozie-ui/popover via the PUBLISHED per-target packages — the header column-menu escapes a scrollable header/body region via `strategy="fixed"`. The 6 `@rozie-ui/popover-<target>` packages are REAL devDependencies so pnpm symlinks them into data-table/node_modules — exactly the surface @rozie/core's resolveManifestProducer walks (node_modules UPWARD from dirname(fromFile) = data-table/src). So the authoring/codegen/VR/LSP surface resolves the stable `<components>` specifier `@rozie-ui/popover/Popover.rozie` to the published per-target package's compiled manifest rather than a colocated sibling copy (the command-palette→combobox precedent graduated in P75). Each leaf declares `@rozie-ui/popover-<target>` as its own runtime peerDependency (the composition's shipped cost); `@floating-ui/dom` is no longer a direct data-table peer/devDep — it graduates to popover-<target>'s own peer. The plain `@rozie-ui/popover` devDependency is kept alongside for the raw-.rozie authoring surface (mirrors command-palette keeping plain `@rozie-ui/combobox`).
